text.title: Page Object Pattern at Scale (Playwright / Cypress) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Page Object Pattern at Scale (Playwright / Cypress) end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: inventory-locators
step.action: Grep all selectors across tests; classify by type.

step.name: map-user-flows
step.action: Group tests by named flow; identify pages.

step.name: draft-page-objects
step.action: Author one method per user action; locators in private fields only.

step.name: wire-contract-tests
step.action: Author contract test pinning each page's public API.

step.name: ban-implicit-waits
step.action: Lint-rule to forbid sleep / cy.wait(ms); use auto-wait assertions.
